ddls:
CREATE TABLE "stocks" (
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Stock ticker symbol */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* Stock exchange where the stock is listed */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the stock is traded */,
  "sector" TEXT /* Sector of the company */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the company */,
  "market_cap" REAL /* Market capitalization of the company */,
  "ipo_date" TEXT /* Initial public offering date */,
  "isin" TEXT /* International Securities Identification Number (ISIN) */,
  "cusip" TEXT /* Committee on Uniform Securities Identification Procedures (CUSIP) */,
  "stock_type" TEXT /* Type of stock (e.g., common, preferred) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the company */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* Logo URL of the company */,
  "website_url" TEXT /* Website URL of the company */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_minute" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "period" INTEGER /* Period of the price data (e.g., 1 for minute-by-minute) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the period */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the period */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the period */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the period */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock during the period */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_minute_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_daily" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the day */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the day */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the day */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the day */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock during the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_daily_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_hourly" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the price data */,
  "hour" INTEGER /* Hour of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the hour */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the hour */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the hour */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the hour */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock during the hour */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_hourly_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_weekly" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "week_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "week_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the week */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the week */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the week */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the week */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock during the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_weekly_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_monthly" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price entry */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "month_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the month */,
  "month_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the month */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the stock */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the stock during the month */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the stock during the month */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the stock */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Volume of trades during the month */,
  "trades" INTEGER /* Number of trades during the month */,
  "vwap" REAL /* Volume-weighted average price (VWAP) of the stock during the month */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_monthly_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "email_verified" INTEGER /* Whether the user's email address has been verified */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolios" (
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each portfolio */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user owning the portfolio */,
  "portfolio_name" TEXT /* Name of the portfolio */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp when the portfolio was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the portfolio */,
  "risk_tolerance" TEXT /* Risk tolerance of the portfolio (e.g., conservative, moderate, aggressive) */,
  "investment_goal" TEXT /* Investment goal of the portfolio (e.g., long-term growth, income generation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolios_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "portfolio_holdings" (
  "holding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holding */,
  "portfolio_id" INTEGER /* ID of the portfolio */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the stock held */,
  "purchase_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was purchased */,
  "purchase_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock purchase */,
  "sale_price" REAL /* Price at which the stock was sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the stock sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_portfolio_id FOREIGN KEY ("portfolio_id") REFERENCES portfolios ("portfolio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_portfolio_holdings_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who set the alert */,
  "stock_id" INTEGER /* ID of the stock the alert is for */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of the alert (e.g., price, volume) */,
  "alert_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the alert (e.g., greater than, less than) */,
  "alert_value" REAL /* Value to trigger the alert */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the alert was created */,
  "last_triggered" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last time the alert was triggered */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of the alert (e.g., real-time, daily, weekly) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_stock_id FOREIGN KEY ("stock_id") REFERENCES stocks ("stock_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the modification occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was modified */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was modified */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "modified_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the modification occurred */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the modification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the versioning occurred */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was versioned */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the record */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)
